issue_title: Swipe : swiper between two WebGL tiles does not work
issue_body_preview:
Issue : 
When creating a swiper between two layers using WebGL tiles, the swiper only displays one of the two layers.

Expected behavior:
The map should print the two layers, with the swiper between them. Here, only one of the two layers is shown on the map.

Cause:
Before being rendered, eac
test_description_zh: 在地图上添加两个 WebGL 瓦片图层，使用 Swipe 控件将它们设置为左右两侧图层。拖动 Swipe 滑块，观察滑块两侧是否分别显示对应的图层。
expected_result_zh: Swipe 滑块两侧应分别正确渲染各自的 WebGL 瓦片图层，拖动滑块时两个图层均可见，滑块左侧显示一个图层、右侧显示另一个图层，而非只显示其中一个图层。
